texts.label: text
texts.orig: In accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth, the following are our expectations of Company name in order to receive the Special Rate  and  Services  from JW  MARRIOTT  MASAI  MARA  LODGE .  The  Special Rate  is confidential and cannot be promoted or sold on the internet or otherwise (including third party websites) unless 'packaged' with other elements. Company  name must ensure that reasonable steps are taken to ensure its B2B Partner does  not sell the room rates provided in a manner that discloses directly or indirectly the accommodation room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Room Availability: The Special Rate is available on a space available basis and at times may not be available unless allotments have been agreed upon in this  Agreement.
texts.text: Room Availability: The Special Rate is available on a space available basis and at times may not be available unless allotments have been agreed upon in this  Agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: JW  Marriott is a truly inspiring 'Spafari' camp, with transformative daily game drive adventures, personalized  and  uncompromising hospitality  and  an  extensive  range of  regenerative  camp  experiences, JW Marriott Masai Mara Lodge spectacularly showcases  the rich cultural and natural spectacle of The Masai  Mara.  Set  in  a  unique  and awe-inspiring  sunset  location,  it's the perfect place to go for a regenerative mind, body and spiritual journey. Conscious and respectful to land and people, every step of the way, we as JW Marriott Masai  Mara  Lodge  have  given  a special focus and spotlight on conservation and community projects.
texts.text: JW  Marriott is a truly inspiring 'Spafari' camp, with transformative daily game drive adventures, personalized  and  uncompromising hospitality  and  an  extensive  range of  regenerative  camp  experiences, JW Marriott Masai Mara Lodge spectacularly showcases  the rich cultural and natural spectacle of The Masai  Mara.  Set  in  a  unique  and awe-inspiring  sunset  location,  it's the perfect place to go for a regenerative mind, body and spiritual journey. Conscious and respectful to land and people, every step of the way, we as JW Marriott Masai  Mara  Lodge  have  given  a special focus and spotlight on conservation and community projects.

texts.label: text

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We welcome and value the necessity of familiarization (FAM) trip to our properties. Please  inquire for agent rate, terms and conditions.
texts.text: We welcome and value the necessity of familiarization (FAM) trip to our properties. Please  inquire for agent rate, terms and conditions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.
texts.text: Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Maximum of 3 single rooms per group at single room rate, any additional single room request  will be charged at a double room rate.
texts.text: Maximum of 3 single rooms per group at single room rate, any additional single room request  will be charged at a double room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The property is unfenced and for safety reasons, we don't recommend children below the age  of 6 years.
texts.text: The property is unfenced and for safety reasons, we don't recommend children below the age  of 6 years.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations are subject to room availability unless a firm room allotment has been agreed  upon as part of this Agreement.
texts.text: All reservations are subject to room availability unless a firm room allotment has been agreed  upon as part of this Agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A booking will only be confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator (payment terms and conditions as per contract), and any further amendments should follow the  same procedure. A booking confirmation voucher will be send to the agent upon receipt of full payments as per the invoice. Please ensure that clients have a copy of their confirmation voucher, as they are required to present this voucher on arrival at the lodge.
texts.text: A booking will only be confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator (payment terms and conditions as per contract), and any further amendments should follow the  same procedure. A booking confirmation voucher will be send to the agent upon receipt of full payments as per the invoice. Please ensure that clients have a copy of their confirmation voucher, as they are required to present this voucher on arrival at the lodge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-in time is 12:00 noon check-out time is 10:00 am All guests arriving before 12:00 noon  will be accommodated as rooms become available. Baggage may be checked-in for those arriving early if rooms are unavailable.
texts.text: Check-in time is 12:00 noon check-out time is 10:00 am All guests arriving before 12:00 noon  will be accommodated as rooms become available. Baggage may be checked-in for those arriving early if rooms are unavailable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations, cancellations and/or amendments must be made in writing and receipt of  cancellation must be acknowledged in writing by JW Marriott Masai Mara Lodge.
texts.text: All reservations, cancellations and/or amendments must be made in writing and receipt of  cancellation must be acknowledged in writing by JW Marriott Masai Mara Lodge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: JW MARRIOTT MASAI MARA LODGE reserves the right to cancel or amend the Services without any liability where the Services cannot be supplied at all or cannot be supplied as described or agreed due to circumstances beyond its control or the control of the applicable  third party suppliers.
texts.text: JW MARRIOTT MASAI MARA LODGE reserves the right to cancel or amend the Services without any liability where the Services cannot be supplied at all or cannot be supplied as described or agreed due to circumstances beyond its control or the control of the applicable  third party suppliers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All bookings are subject to Lodge standard booking requirements, available upon request,  cancellation policies, check-in and check-out times.
texts.text: All bookings are subject to Lodge standard booking requirements, available upon request,  cancellation policies, check-in and check-out times.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Lodge will collect payment from its guests for any automatic and mandatory charges,  and incidental charges not included in the Standard Room Charge (defined below).
texts.text: The Lodge will collect payment from its guests for any automatic and mandatory charges,  and incidental charges not included in the Standard Room Charge (defined below).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All information provided to you by the lodge must be reproduced without changes. You must provide the Hotel with copies of any distributed content at points of sale upon request.  You shall make Marriott guest rooms available for booking using only the rate plans provided  by Lodge under this Agreement. You shall not display other third party rate plans or other information for the Lodge including wholesale and other third party affiliated rate plans and information. 'Your Channel(s)' means, except as disapproved by Marriott or lodge in its sole and absolute discretion from time to time, collectively, any mechanism (e.g., websites, xml feeds or call centers), in each case owned or operated by you or one of your affiliates, through which you market Dynamic Packages directly for booking by Lodge guests. All terms and conditions of this Agreement applicable to you shall apply directly and in full to your Channels. 'Dynamic Package' means the combination of a room made available under this Agreement with one or more other travel-related components of material value such as air inventory, rental car inventory, or rail ticket, that is booked concurrently in the same session where the Rate is not apparent to the guest.
texts.text: All information provided to you by the lodge must be reproduced without changes. You must provide the Hotel with copies of any distributed content at points of sale upon request.  You shall make Marriott guest rooms available for booking using only the rate plans provided  by Lodge under this Agreement. You shall not display other third party rate plans or other information for the Lodge including wholesale and other third party affiliated rate plans and information. 'Your Channel(s)' means, except as disapproved by Marriott or lodge in its sole and absolute discretion from time to time, collectively, any mechanism (e.g., websites, xml feeds or call centers), in each case owned or operated by you or one of your affiliates, through which you market Dynamic Packages directly for booking by Lodge guests. All terms and conditions of this Agreement applicable to you shall apply directly and in full to your Channels. 'Dynamic Package' means the combination of a room made available under this Agreement with one or more other travel-related components of material value such as air inventory, rental car inventory, or rail ticket, that is booked concurrently in the same session where the Rate is not apparent to the guest.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RATES VALID FOR OPAQUE PACKAGED TRAVEL ONLY
texts.text: RATES VALID FOR OPAQUE PACKAGED TRAVEL ONLY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates quoted herein are applicable to FIT leisure packaged travel only. The rates quoted in this Agreement are only for you to facilitate the booking by individual transient leisure travel guests of opaque packaged rates, not for business travel or group travel-oriented channels. You are not authorized to release these rates to any other individual or entity, including but not limited to, internet booking/electronic distribution systems, except to offline travel agencies or as and to the extent specifically authorized by Marriott or the Hotel from time to time and subject to its sole and absolute discretion to terminate with immediate  effect any prior authorizations. You may not offer these rates as room-only / unbundled bookings in any manner (e.g. room tax and/or fees listed separately). Package components must be booked concurrently with the room booking, and the prices for each of the package  components (hotel room, airfare and/or car rental) shall not be itemized for, disclosed to or discernible by the guest at any time (including but not limited to billing statements) and you must not provide functionality which would permit guests to strip the package down to view  Hotel room rates separately at any time. Furthermore, you agree to indemnify lodge for any loss or damage arising from your breach of this Section.
texts.text: All rates quoted herein are applicable to FIT leisure packaged travel only. The rates quoted in this Agreement are only for you to facilitate the booking by individual transient leisure travel guests of opaque packaged rates, not for business travel or group travel-oriented channels. You are not authorized to release these rates to any other individual or entity, including but not limited to, internet booking/electronic distribution systems, except to offline travel agencies or as and to the extent specifically authorized by Marriott or the Hotel from time to time and subject to its sole and absolute discretion to terminate with immediate  effect any prior authorizations. You may not offer these rates as room-only / unbundled bookings in any manner (e.g. room tax and/or fees listed separately). Package components must be booked concurrently with the room booking, and the prices for each of the package  components (hotel room, airfare and/or car rental) shall not be itemized for, disclosed to or discernible by the guest at any time (including but not limited to billing statements) and you must not provide functionality which would permit guests to strip the package down to view  Hotel room rates separately at any time. Furthermore, you agree to indemnify lodge for any loss or damage arising from your breach of this Section.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For guest rooms booked by guests through you or your Channels at rates provided through  this Agreement, you will pay the lodge an amount equal to 100% of the rate plus any applicable taxes and other charges (the 'Standard Room Charge') not included in the rate above. As between you and the Lodge, you will retain all amounts by which the price of a Dynamic Package exceeds the Standard Room Charge (the 'Guest Price') You will be solely  responsible for, and will timely remit to the proper taxing authorities, any and all taxes, duties, charges and governmental fees that are applicable to the difference between the Guest Price and the Standard Room Charge.
texts.text: For guest rooms booked by guests through you or your Channels at rates provided through  this Agreement, you will pay the lodge an amount equal to 100% of the rate plus any applicable taxes and other charges (the 'Standard Room Charge') not included in the rate above. As between you and the Lodge, you will retain all amounts by which the price of a Dynamic Package exceeds the Standard Room Charge (the 'Guest Price') You will be solely  responsible for, and will timely remit to the proper taxing authorities, any and all taxes, duties, charges and governmental fees that are applicable to the difference between the Guest Price and the Standard Room Charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You must, and must take commercially reasonable steps to ensure that your Channels: (a) advise all guests that they are responsible for payment of all charges over and above the Standard Room Charge (e.g., internet access); and (b) clearly and conspicuously disclose to  guests in advance of booking all state and local taxes and all automatic or mandatory charges (e.g., resort charges) specified by the lodge, so as to ensure affirmative, knowing consent by the guest to such fees prior to purchase.
texts.text: You must, and must take commercially reasonable steps to ensure that your Channels: (a) advise all guests that they are responsible for payment of all charges over and above the Standard Room Charge (e.g., internet access); and (b) clearly and conspicuously disclose to  guests in advance of booking all state and local taxes and all automatic or mandatory charges (e.g., resort charges) specified by the lodge, so as to ensure affirmative, knowing consent by the guest to such fees prior to purchase.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You will comply with all applicable foreign and domestic laws, codes, regulations, ordinances  and rules with respect to your obligations under this Agreement and the services to be provided by you hereunder, including but not limited to any laws and regulations governing package and tour travel operators/organizers.
texts.text: You will comply with all applicable foreign and domestic laws, codes, regulations, ordinances  and rules with respect to your obligations under this Agreement and the services to be provided by you hereunder, including but not limited to any laws and regulations governing package and tour travel operators/organizers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each party acts as an independent controller with respect to its processing of personal data  in connection with this Agreement. Each party will comply with its respective obligations under applicable data protection laws with respect to its processing of such personal data. To the extent that either party provides personal data to the other party pursuant to this agreement, the party supplying the personal data confirms that it has consent or another legal basis to provide the personal data to the receiving party and for the receiving party to  process the personal data consistent with this Agreement, and in accordance with its applicable privacy policy. For clarity, nothing in this Agreement limits a party's ability to use  an individual's personal data to the extent directed by, consented to or requested by such individual.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You must procure, maintain and keep in full force and effect during the term of the agreement adequate insurance coverage (including public liability or commercial general liability insurance and property) as required by law, with a reputable company, including insurance coverage as required under applicable Marriott standards as Hotel may notify you  from time to time.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The parties agree that any dispute in any way arising out of or relating to this Agreement will be resolved by arbitration before JAMS/ENDISPUTE® or the American Arbitration Association in the state and city in which the Hotel is located or the closest available location; provided, however, a dispute relating to infringement of intellectual property rights  shall not be subject to this provision. The parties further agree that in any arbitration proceeding they may conduct reasonable discovery pursuant to the arbitration rules, that the law of the state, province or country in which the Hotel is located is will be the governing law, and any arbitration award will be enforceable in that state's, province's or federal court.
texts.text: The parties agree that any dispute in any way arising out of or relating to this Agreement will be resolved by arbitration before JAMS/ENDISPUTE® or the American Arbitration Association in the state and city in which the Hotel is located or the closest available location; provided, however, a dispute relating to infringement of intellectual property rights  shall not be subject to this provision. The parties further agree that in any arbitration proceeding they may conduct reasonable discovery pursuant to the arbitration rules, that the law of the state, province or country in which the Hotel is located is will be the governing law, and any arbitration award will be enforceable in that state's, province's or federal court.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lodge will follow its customary relocation policy in regard to Customers. It is standard practice when relocating a customer, to refer the customer to a comparable Marriott affiliated lodge in the area or a hotel of another brand in the area with comparable standards  of hospitality.

Any breach by you of obligations under Your Obligations will be a material breach of the  Agreement, resulting in an immediate suspension or termination of the Agreement, as solely determined by Hotel in its reasonable judgment. You shall inform Hotel of any violations of the Agreement of which you become aware.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Upon termination of the Agreement, Hotel and you will continue to honor the terms of the Agreement with respect to any booking made prior to the termination date for dates  following the termination date, unless termination occurred due to a monetary breach.
texts.text: Upon termination of the Agreement, Hotel and you will continue to honor the terms of the Agreement with respect to any booking made prior to the termination date for dates  following the termination date, unless termination occurred due to a monetary breach.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If acts of God or government authorities, natural disasters, pandemic, or other emergencies beyond a party's reasonable control make it illegal or impossible for such  party to perform its obligations under this agreement, such party may terminate this agreement upon written notice to the other party without liability.
